samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Divide 16-bit dividend by 8-bit divisor in combinational logic.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="A" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit dividend.</input>
        <input id="B" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit divisor.</input>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit quotient.</output>
        <output id="odd" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit remainder.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>Extracts higher bits of dividend, compares with divisor, sets quotient based on comparison, concatenates remainder with next dividend bits, repeats until all dividend bits processed.</implementation>
</module>
